full_text:
Q1. Define Artificial Intelligence? (2 marks)
Ans 1. Artificial Intelligence (AI) is when machines are made to think and learn like
humans. Al uses algorithms to help computers perform tasts ouch as recognizing
speech, playing games, or solving problems. However, Al can sometimes
make mistakes.
Ans 2) Write an essay on global warming. (5 marks)
Global warming means Earth's temperature is rising because of too much carbon
dioxide (COz) and other greenhouse gases. These gases come from cars,
factories, and deforestation. Global warming causes ice caps to melt, sefieme
sea levels to rise, and weather events like hurricanes to get worse. We can
help by using renewablle energy like solar and wind, and by reducing waste
to slow down emíssions. If we don't act, our planet will face extreme heat, fluoding,
and damage to ecosystems.
Ans 3) List the advantages of EVs. (4 marks)
Electric vehicles (EVs) have many advantages:
1. They produce zero emissions, helping to reduce air pollution.
2. EVs are cheaper to run than gasaline cars because electricty cass than fuel
3. EVs require less maintenance because they have fewer moving parts.

Define Artificial Intelligence? (2 marks)
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is when machines are made to think and learn like
humans. Al uses algorithms to help computers perform tasts ouch as recognizing
speech, playing games, or solving problems. However, Al can sometimes

They produce zero emissions, helping to reduce air pollution.

Write an essay on global warming. (5 marks)
Global warming means Earth's temperature is rising because of too much carbon
dioxide (COz) and other greenhouse gases. These gases come from cars,
factories, and deforestation. Global warming causes ice caps to melt, sefieme
sea levels to rise, and weather events like hurricanes to get worse. We can
help by using renewablle energy like solar and wind, and by reducing waste
to slow down emíssions. If we don't act, our planet will face extreme heat, fluoding,

EVs require less maintenance because they have fewer moving parts.
